ftbquesttransl.batch.title: Batch Translation Options
ftbquesttransl.configuration.targetLangu: Target language for translation (ISO 639-1 code). Set to 'auto' to use Minecraft's language setting.
ftbquesttransl.configuration.enableCachi: Cache translations in memory to avoid re-translating the same text
ftbquesttransl.configuration.translation: Which translation API to use (GOOGLE, MYMEMORY, DEEPL)
ftbquesttransl.configuration.deepLApiKey: Authentication key for DeepL translation service (get from deepl.com)
ftbquesttransl.configuration.enableTrans: Show yellow wave animation while a quest is being translated
Show green wave animation when a quest has been translated
ftbquesttransl.configuration.enableTtsLo: Enable yellow colored ring animations around the TTS button while loading audio
ftbquesttransl.configuration.enableTtsPl: Enable colored ring animations around the TTS button while playing audio
ftbquesttransl.configuration.translation: How long the green translation animation should be shown in milliseconds
ftbquesttransl.configuration.ttsPitch.to: Pitch multiplier for the reader voice (Default: 1.0)
ftbquesttransl.configuration.ttsRate.too: Speed multiplier for the reader voice (Default: 1.0)
ftbquesttransl.error.unsupported_desc: Translation API doesn't support this language.
ftbquesttransl.error.missing_api_desc: Please configure your DeepL API key in the Translation Options.
ftbquesttransl.configuration.enableLarge: Show a confirmation popup before translating extremely large quests to save API quota
ftbquesttransl.configuration.largeTextTh: Character count threshold for the large text warning
ftbquesttransl.supported_language_region: Language supported, but will be translated to base language (%s)
ftbquesttransl.batch.chat_started: [TFQ] Mass translation started. Target language: %s. Quests remaining: %s
ftbquesttransl.batch.confirm_restart_des: This chapter has already been translated. Translating it again will restart the process and clear the existing translation cache for this chapter. Do you wish to continue?
ftbquesttransl.batch.confirm_new_over_ol: Are you sure you want to discard the previous progress?
ftbquesttransl.glossary.info.title: How the glossary works?
ftbquesttransl.glossary.info.desc: The glossary replaces specific words before or after translation.
ftbquesttransl.glossary.info.original: Original Word: the word or phrase to find in the quest.
ftbquesttransl.glossary.info.translated: Translated Word: what to replace it with.
ftbquesttransl.glossary.info.lang: Lang: the target language for this rule.
ftbquesttransl.glossary.info.all_mode: ALL mode: the rule applies to any language.
